hero.eyebrow: Freelance data & automation—dashboards to apps. Clear scope, documented handoffs.
hero.lead: We help organizations move from messy data and manual work to clear metrics, light-weight pipelines, and small apps that fit how you already operate. Engagements are scoped for outcomes: documented deliverables, sensible defaults, and no mystery stack.
hero.sublead: Fixed milestones where it helps, transparent estimates, and deliverables you own (code, repos, docs).

servicesOverview.title: Services overview
servicesOverview.intro: We work with a data-first mindset: fewer moving parts, explicit assumptions, and handoffs your team can run. We can own discovery through delivery or embed alongside your developers for a defined slice.

analysis.title: Analysis & dashboards
analysis.desc: Metrics and visuals that support real decisions.

engineering.title: Practical data engineering
engineering.desc: Pipelines and clean tables without platform overload.

websites.title: Websites
websites.desc: Credible, fast sites with SEO and analytics basics.

apps.title: Apps
apps.desc: MVPs and internal tools with data in mind.

automation.title: Automation
automation.desc: Reliable replacements for repetitive data and ops work.

dashboards.title: Data analysis & dashboards
dashboards.intro: Turn scattered spreadsheets and exports into decisions: clean metrics, interactive dashboards, and short narratives leadership can act on.
bullets: Clear questions and success metrics agreed up front
Cleaned, documented datasets suitable for reuse
Dashboards (Looker Studio, Power BI, Tableau, or code-based stacks) wired to your sources where possible
A one-page summary for stakeholders on how to read it
dashboards.footer: If you can describe the decision you need to make, we can shape the analysis and dashboard around it.

pipelines.title: Data pipelines & engineering (practical scope)
pipelines.intro: Reliable, smaller-scale data plumbing: scheduled extracts, transforms, and loads so reporting and apps stay consistent without a full platform team.
bullets: Simple, maintainable pipelines (scheduled jobs, cloud functions, lightweight orchestration)
Staging and curated layers with naming conventions your team can extend
Basic monitoring with failure alerts, run logs, and recovery notes
Documentation: source-to-target map, refresh frequency, owner checklist
pipelines.footer: Share your sources and where numbers need to land; you will get a concrete pipeline design and effort range.

websites.title: Websites for businesses and professionals
websites.intro: Fast, clear sites that explain what you do, capture leads, and stay easy to update—built with modern stacks and sensible structure.
bullets: Structure and copy guidance (or integration with your writer)
Responsive layout, accessibility basics, and performance-minded setup
Contact forms, analytics hooks, and SEO foundations
Deployment to your hosting with handoff docs
websites.footer: Send examples of sites you like and your must-have sections; you will get a fixed page list and timeline.

automation.title: Data & process automation
automation.intro: Replace repetitive copy-paste, file shuffling, and report assembly with dependable automation—logged, scheduled, and owned by your team.
bullets: Map of current manual steps and failure points
Automated flows with clear inputs and outputs
Notifications on success/failure and simple runbooks
Optional admin view or spreadsheet control panel for non-developers
automation.footer: Walk through one painful weekly task; you will get an automation sketch and effort estimate before any build commitment.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.priceA: Pricing will depend on the scope of the project, and whether there is a need for recurring monthly services.
faq.needQ: What do we need from you?
faq.needA: Access to systems or sample data, a stakeholder for decisions, and examples of good outputs where they exist.
faq.remoteA: Yes, but also flexible to meet in person if the location allows for it.

appsPage.title: Web & mobile-friendly applications
appsPage.wishlyDesc: Never miss a birthday—Wishly keeps personal reminders simple, with privacy-first positioning and apps on the stores.
appsPage.vitaflowDesc: Turn lab reports into plain-language insights—track biomarkers over time, compare visits, and stay in control of your data.
